channel.title: Libertas - Weekly Digests
channel.description: Weekly summaries of freedom technology developments

item.title: Weekly Digest: 2026-01-15 to 2026-01-21
item.description: Iran's complete internet blackout during deadly protests demonstrates the urgent need for censorship-resistant communication tools, while copyright law's structural incentives continue driving platform over-censorship. Meanwhile, nation-state blockchain adoption expands with Bhutan's validator operations.
